summary: Full player journey audit: IntroCeltOSâ†’Menuâ†’SelectionSauvegardeâ†’HubAntreâ†’BroceliandeForest3Dâ†’Cardsâ†’RunEndâ†’Hub. 10 checks. 2 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 3 PASS.

SelectionSauvegarde.note: HubAntre path correct. MEDIUM: MerlinStore not autoload â€” LOAD_PROFILE dispatch may silently fail

IntroPersonalityQuiz.note: Still exists (director q-20260414-005: delete). Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES P3 pending

SceneRencontreMerlin.note: Still exists (director q-20260414-005: delete). Same task

BroceliandeForest3D.note: Exists, walk_event_controller wired, graceful fallback if no MerlinStore

BroceliandeForest3D_merlin_found.note: GAME_SCENE=MerlinGame.tscn (orphan). _on_hub() routes to orphan when _merlin_found=true. Task E2E-MERLINGAME-OBSOLETE-PATH pending.

RunEnd_transition.note: walk_event_controller._check_run_end() only checks life<=0. No MOS hard_max, no victory, no faction endings. EndRunScreen.tscn NEVER shown in active path. BroceliandeForest3D has no handler for run_ended signal.

EndRunScreen.note: scenes/EndRunScreen.tscn exists but unreachable from active play path. Only accessible via dead GameFlowController path.

findings.issue: _check_run_end() only checks life<=0. Missing: MOS hard_max (50 cards), victory (mission complete), StoreRun.check_run_end() full logic. Faction endings never evaluated in active path.
findings.impact: Run never ends via victory or MOS timeout. Faction endings never shown. Game loop incomplete.

findings.issue: GAME_SCENE='res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn' â€” orphan scene. _on_hub() routes to it when _merlin_found=true. MerlinGame.tscn is the old pre-refactor card scene.
findings.impact: When Merlin is found, game crashes or shows stale scene.

findings.issue: BroceliandeForest3D does not listen for run_ended signal from MerlinStore. After walk_event_controller emits run_ended, nothing transitions to EndRunScreen.tscn.
findings.impact: Run end has no resolution screen, no rewards, no Anam calculation.

findings.issue: Director q-20260414-005 ordered deletion. Still present.
findings.impact: Dead code, potential confusion. Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES pending.

findings.issue: LOAD_PROFILE dispatch requires MerlinStore on /root. MerlinStore is NOT autoloaded. Silently falls to _build_profile_ui() when store not found.
findings.impact: Continue flow broken if entering SelectionSauvegarde without MerlinStore on root (e.g. direct scene entry).

findings.issue: _find_store() returns null if MerlinStore not on /root. Fallback mode: no faction tracking, no save, no card profile. _gameplay_active=true despite missing data.
findings.impact: Player can play without any progress being saved or faction reps tracked.

findings.issue: HubAntre.gd does not read run_state from save system on entry. If player continues an in-progress run, the run_state is not pre-loaded into any active system.
findings.impact: Continue run may start fresh instead of resuming from save.

findings.issue: check_run_end() data layer correct: faction_rep>=80 detection, all 3 end paths include faction_endings_available.
get_available_endings() pure static function. Correct threshold 80, handles multi-faction case.
